29.gl: (adverbially) in front of; usually (with other particles) on account of, so as, since, hence

29.gl: that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
29.kj: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

29.gl: {properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense)}

29.gl: {above, over, upon, or against (yet always in this last relation with a downward aspect) in a great variety of applications}
29.kj: about, against, concerning, for, (there-) fore, from, in, [idiom] more, of, (there-, up-) on, (in-) to, [phrase] why with.
